package rulecoverage

func NegativeGoPerfLayerNetworkCallsDnsLookupPerRequestPath() string {
    ruleID := "go_perf_layer_network_calls_dns_lookup_per_request_path"
    family := "performance"
    severity := "contextual"
    status := "stable"
    intent := "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description := "Layer: Network calls. Flag net.Lookup* calls in request paths without caching or resolver ownership."
    return ruleID + family + severity + status + intent + description
}
